name: com.maxenceguidez.mxunikit.provider
description: Provides a lightweight service locator for a project. Services and managers are registered and resolved by type, with explicit registration and shutdown-aware resolution so lookups fail predictably instead of silently. It removes the need for singletons while keeping cross-system access simple.

samples.description: Demonstrates registration, resolution and MonoBehaviour managers using MxProvider.
Demonstrates registering a manager under both its abstract base and concrete type keys, and resolving it by each.
